rules.rule: the Knowledge OS packages SEMANTIC manual knowledge ONLY; presentation/UI/CSS/responsive behavior/layouts/typography are OUT OF SCOPE.
consumer systems (WordPress, WooCommerce, React frontends, PDF generators, documentation renderers) are responsible for ALL rendering, CSS, breakpoints, layouts, and presentation.
exports MUST be consumed by the consumer system; the runtime does NOT inject CSS, manage layouts, manage breakpoints, or optimize for screen size.
the runtime does NOT govern frontend/theme systems and NEVER writes the live publication tree or any prior-layer runtime tree.
this separation is enforced constitutionally; violations are fail-closed.
